unit: Unit 12: Everyday Life with Your Mac
title: Common Daily Tasks
drDigitalIntro: Once you're comfortable with your Mac, you'll find yourself doing the same things every day: checking email, browsing the web, reading the news, watching videos, video calling family, writing notes, and managing files. The more you practice these everyday tasks, the faster and easier they become. Your Mac is a versatile tool — in this unit we'll bring all your skills together for real-life use.

playgroundTask.question: You want to video call your grandchild who has an iPhone. Which Apple app lets you do this for free?

drDigitalSuccess: FaceTime is Apple's free video and audio calling app — works between Macs, iPhones, and iPads.
drDigitalHint: Which app is specifically designed for video calls on Apple devices?
